title: Corporations - Canada.ca
content:
For tax years starting after 2023, most corporations have to file their T2 return electronically. See Corporation income tax return for more information.
What's new for corporations
- Request a comfort letter

## Forms and publications
- Guide T4012, T2 Corporation – Income Tax Guide
- Guide RC4088, General Index of Financial Information (GIFI)

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
